reviews.title: Kyle was a great help in a very…
reviews.body: Kyle was a great help in a very stressful situation

reviews.title: What a joy to find humans that care.
reviews.body: What a joy to find humans that care. being "mature" ( or old in old speak)  banks can be intimidating & unhelpful whereas the Saffron were understanding and friendly and made opening an account es easy as they are allowed to legally !  They pay a good rate of interest and cant be faulted.  Russell Smith was amazing helping me open my business account and now Iwill open a private one as well.         BTW - IF you know any charities they do an amazingly great account for charity to make a good interest on their savings !

reviews.title: Fantasitc Service
reviews.body: I had forgotten about the email I received regarding reinvestment for an ISA so to receive a phone call about renewal was magnificent.  Thank you so much.  I'm staying with you forever.

reviews.title: Helpful staff
reviews.body: Helpful staff.  Good interest rate for our community savings account.

reviews.title: Amazing Customer Service
reviews.body: Andy took my call today to help locate my children's bonds we'd misplaced all information for, he took his time to help give us all the information required before aiding me to get logged on the app to be able to view these quicker and easier - answered all questions and very patient and suggested many different avenues to get the answers.

reviews.title: Really good appointment
reviews.body: really good appointment, very helpful and attentive to our need to help get the best for the money held at Saffron -  helped that he was a Buntingford boy.

reviews.title: Sophia
reviews.body: Sophia dealt with my phone call in an extremely friendly and professional manner. She was helpful without being patronising and solved a longstanding problem with ease. An asset to your organisation!Celia

reviews.title: Saffron Building Society you should…
reviews.body: Saffron Building Society you should celebrate your achievements - you’ve got unparalleled customer service systems in place that the majority of other companies could learn lessons from ….. my issue this morning was resolved professionally, quickly and without any ‘can’t do’s’ by Abbie Mead.Thanks Abbie you were exemplary this morning

reviews.title: Always really efficient and friendly!
reviews.body: Reply from Saffron Building Society

reviews.title: Saffron Building Society are outstanding
reviews.body: Saffron Building Society are outstanding. Had a query about some children's' accounts closing and rang them. Spoke to Lewis, he was amazing and sorted it for me

reviews.title: Sophia was wonderful
reviews.body: Sophia was wonderful. Helpful, patient and friendly. Helping Saffron to keep customers happy. A real credit to the company.

reviews.title: A very pleasant and efficient…
reviews.body: A very pleasant and efficient appointment with Kyle S.

reviews.title: I visited the branch in order to close an account
reviews.body: I visited the branch in order to close my mother's various accounts for which I had LPA.Kyle Stanway talked me through the process, making all the steps easy to understand so they were quickly effected. His approach was friendly and efficient.

reviews.title: The staff are really helpful and thorough about choosing your investment
reviews.body: The staff, Emily, were knowledgeable and made time to explain my investment to me. It’s good to have a face to face consultation where you can ask questions

reviews.title: Password Problems
reviews.body: I was having problems setting a password when opening a new account, I called the Help Line.I was greeted by Jodie in a friendly manor, not to robotic.We went through the problem together, she pinpointed it to being certain characters that the system does not like.  Gave me a temporary password and i was away.She stuck with it, never talked down to me.  I am looking forward to many years dealing with Saffron.

reviews.title: Emily was very welcoming and made me feel comfotable.me…
reviews.body: Emily was very welcoming and made me feel comfortable. She was very helpful in guiding me through the ISA process.I would like to thank her for her help and care.

reviews.title: I loved  the polite
reviews.body: I loved  the polite, courteous  and efficient  disposition of Zoe. She made me feel  very comfortable and shared a little  conversation that was caring , compassionate and empathetic! So lovely to talk to a person  and not a jobsworth or machine!

reviews.title: Excellent Customer Service
reviews.body: Excellent customer service from a member of staff at Saffron Building Society. Zoe was polite and helpful when I telephoned the 0800 number recently to close an account.

reviews.title: Very impressed with the knowledge and…
reviews.body: Very impressed with the knowledge and service

reviews.title: Great customer service, thanks Zoe
reviews.body: Really good service, call was answered straight away and Zoe was super helpful.

reviews.title: Jodie
reviews.body: Really helpful and professional. Supported me with my issue and I didn't feel rushed. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.title: The staff were all extremely helpful
reviews.body: The staff were all extremely helpful - especially Emily. I felt supported and informed throughout and I felt that the process of opening an account was uncomplicated and easy.

reviews.title: Customer service
reviews.body: Jodie was extremely patient during the process of gaining access to my online account. She helped me to do this in an extremely professional and positive manner- going above and beyond the call of duty.

reviews.title: Appreciation of Chi for the excellent customer service …
reviews.body: I had called for a specific purpose and the call was attended to with exacting customer service standards. Appreciation of Chi for the excellent service offering customer satisfaction. What I would like to highlight is the value addition to the call and discussing points that would benefit the customer and that made the experience great.I also wish to add that I had requested a call back via the website and received call without any delay the very next day. All best wishes to Chi.

reviews.title: Helpful Zoe
reviews.body: Very helpful and friendly solved my account problem.

reviews.title: Recent Experience
reviews.body: HiLauren gave us excellent Service to resolve a Cash need both succinctly, and successfully, recently.The whole Team at Saffron Walden are always cheerful and courteous whenever you visit, and provide a professional service. Thank you so much for Saffron BS being in Ware; your presence is welcomed given that all other Banks have failed the people of Ware.

reviews.title: Saffron Building Society customer support.
reviews.body: I called the support line as I was unable to make a transfer between accounts online, the very helpful lady who dealt with my call was very polite, professional and dealt with my issue promptly. I would like to add that every time that I have needed to call for support, my calls have always been dealt with in the same manner. Well done Saffron Building Society, your customer service is great.

reviews.title: Zoe is an absolute pleasure to deal…
reviews.body: Zoe is an absolute pleasure to deal with, and very thorough. She actually remembers me from previous conversations and has a really professional manner.Lovely girl

reviews.title: Zoe was very understanding
reviews.body: Zoe explained everything clearly and got me to understand which is a miracle in itself over the telephone!Hopefully my query has now been sorted.

reviews.title: Emily Barker-Grocott saw us on time and…
reviews.body: Emily Barker-Grocott saw us on time and was very helpful when dealing with our requests and explained everything clearly.

reviews.title: Zoe was very helpful and informative
reviews.body: Zoe was very helpful and informative.  She made it easy for me to decide what to do with my money.

reviews.title: Easy to contact. Feels like personal service.
reviews.body: The customer services are really easy to get hold of and don't make you feel rushed.

reviews.title: On the help lines they are very…
reviews.body: On the help lines they are very thorough and helpful when I didn't understand the interest process on my account

reviews.title: Stacey
reviews.body: Stacey, the lady I spoke to was really professional and so helpful. It was pleasure to deal with a company with so much customer focus. Often lost in business now.

reviews.title: This Building Society is hit and miss…
reviews.body: This Building Society is hit and miss (more hit than miss it has to be said). Interest rates used to be very competitive but no longer. Rage of accounts with monthly interest option is too limited (I always go for monthly interest so only have 2 accounts here).On the positive side, the customer service is superb - on the phone and web chat - excellent staff knowledge and helpfulness which beats anyone else. And the speed of answering the phone is excellent, no hanging around for ages. Also found opening accounts an very easy process.

reviews.title: Zoe went beyond the call of duty.
reviews.body: Zoe went beyond the call of duty.As pensioners she was extra patient.A lovely personal telephone experience.Sorted out our problem with great diplomacy.Thank you Zoe a credit to your team

reviews.title: Freddy helped me resolve a problem in a…
reviews.body: Freddy helped me resolve a problem in a friendly manner

reviews.title: Chi Cameron
reviews.body: I spoke this morning with Chi Cameron, as I had made an error on moving funds, via my mobile phone, from my Bank to Saffron Building society. I had made an error on my Saffron account number. Chi was extremely helpful, noted down the issue, and contacted the payment team. Within a few minutes, the issued had been resolved. I was impressed with her attention to detail and her ability to resolve my error.

reviews.title: The most accessible Saffron Walden Building Society
reviews.body: They have offices that are open with pleasant and knowledgeable staff. We don't have to "Do it. On line" and the face to face interaction is why we use Saffron Walden Building Society.We also completed our wills and power of attorney which were recommended by the investment staff whilst arranging our Isa's.

reviews.title: More brilliant customer service from…
reviews.body: More brilliant customer service from SBS by Stacey this morning:  explaining everything straightforwardly and with patience and humour.  Thank you.

reviews.title: Stacey
reviews.body: I phoned Saffron because I received a text to say I had requested to withdraw money from an account I hold with them.  I had not made any request and I wanted to make sure my money was safe.  Stacey is the latest in a long line of Saffron staff members who have been friendly, helpful, knowledgeable and thoroughly charming.  It is always a pleasure to talk to a member of the Saffron family.

reviews.title: Financial review took place on time. The staff member was polite, friendly and gave me all the information I needed
reviews.body: Very polite, friendly and highly knowledgeable member of staff gave me all the information I needed.

reviews.title: Stacey was fabulous
reviews.body: Stacey was fabulous.  Very knowledgeable and reassuring with the issue with my account. I felt extraordinary confident Stacey would sort everything out.  Thank you Stacey

reviews.title: Stacey
reviews.body: Stacey was able to guide me through the necessary steps I needed to answer my query. It was gratifying to be able to talk to her in person. She stayed on the line while I went through the steps to access my account. Thank you.

reviews.title: Easy of contacting society
reviews.body: Easy of contacting society. Ability of the agent, Stacey, to give me the information I required. She spoke in a clear and friendly manner.

reviews.title: Dealing with somebody competent
reviews.body: Dealing with somebody competent, who asked the right questions, and took me quickly to my desired outcome. Stacey also explained what the follow-up would be in clear terms.

reviews.title: Stacey
reviews.body: Stacey, the assistant who helped me was very patient, kind and efficient in guiding me through the chain of unfamiliar and complex (from my perspective) net manipulations to help me to gain an online access to my account.

reviews.title: Very professional customer service
reviews.body: Very professional customer service. Thanks

reviews.title: Help at end of phone .
reviews.body: I had to phone twice as my phone wouldn't dill with my problem.The lady & the man I spoke to were extremely helpful & very patient with me being as I'm not very phone tech savvy.They guided me through each step to help me with my query.VERY happy.

reviews.title: They genuinely care.
reviews.body: Every time I call or go into the society everyone is so pleasant and cannot do enough for you. It’s a breath of fresh air. And an actual branch on the high street! A rarity in itself.

reviews.title: Zoe got to the point and solved my…
reviews.body: Zoe got to the point and solved my problem

reviews.title: Simple and straightforward.
reviews.body: Simple and straightforward.So lovely to be able to give instruction by telephone.  Zoe was more than helpful in following my investment instructions. A pleasure to do business with her.

reviews.title: Fantastic personal service
reviews.body: Stacey was super helpful clear and nice to chat to. Made dealing with finances a pleasure. Its the sort of service you don't get from most financial institutions and it makes saffrom walden BS stand out

reviews.title: Freddie from halstead branch  made our…
reviews.body: Freddie from halstead branch  made our experience brilliant so helpful and fab to speak to!

reviews.title: Zoe was patient and kind while i…
reviews.body: Zoe was patient and kind while i struggled to access the passwords and login details. Being dyslexia these things are more challenging for me. Lovely lady and was a joy to speak too on the phone.

reviews.title: Consistent positive experience
reviews.body: Prompt, clear and guided support from Stacey. Staff always accessible for support in my experience.

reviews.title: Saffron Building Society
reviews.body: Many thanks to Stacey who was very kind, helpful and patient when I needed support logging into my online account. Great service.

reviews.title: Stacey was very helpful
reviews.body: Stacey was very helpful and took her time to make sure all the details were covered. Very much appreciated.

reviews.title: Poor experience with Saffron
reviews.body: I opened an account for my granddaughter which matures this year. I had not checked it, I don't think, since just after opening but tried to access it recently. On entering my details my account was immediately blocked. I spent all afternoon, spoke to four different members of staff, given four temporary passwords (two of which I later learned, did not have the correct number of characters required) and each time of trying my account was showing as blocked. I tried again for some time the following day without success. I was eventually contacted by a member of staff who did finally help me access my account and apologised for my experience. I was offered £15 as compensation and when I stated I did not think that was adequate for the stress and inconvenience I had experienced, the offer was withdrawn and I was told my complaint was not upheld! Disgusting customer care. I am definitely not happy with the experience I have had with Saffron!Thank you for your response Saffron.  Shame your poor customer service could not have been sorted between ourselves.  And yes, I will be taking this up with the Financial Ombudsman.

reviews.title: Stacey was a diamond
reviews.body: Stacey was very helpful and very quickly understood my queries and was able to action them and resolve them during the entirety of the call and although I can use the website sometimes it becomes difficult so I prefer to speak to an advisor.  Saffron BS are very good when it comes to customer service on the phone especially for their older customers.

reviews.title: Wonderful team at Bishop's Stortford
reviews.body: Wonderful team at Bishop's Stortford. Went to their open day today and very impressed by the approach of the team in their discussions as well as the coffee and cakes! Well organised event - thanks!

reviews.title: Excellent assistance
reviews.body: I had some complex questions which Stacey handled very competently and explained everything to me in an easy manner.I very much appreciate the assistance that she gave me.😀👍🏻

reviews.title: Supportive, helpful, kind Staff
reviews.body: The person I spoke to Chi, is very professional and informative, helpful and kind.

reviews.title: Good call back experience
reviews.body: Jean Paul gave me a punctual call back, spoke clearly and accurately with advice about my savings account.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.body: Such a helpful person...sorted out my query in a lovely friendly manner. A definite asset to the Saffron team

reviews.title: Really efficient
reviews.body: Really efficient, professional and easily understandable company.

reviews.title: Smooth account opening process
reviews.body: Smooth account opening process, friendly customer service. Pleasure to deal with. Thank you.

reviews.title: They were very helpful and polite
reviews.body: They were very helpful and actioned all my requirements while on the phone. Although, if the companies website allowed customers to transfer funds for all their accounts in the first place, it wouldn't need to call them in the first place.

reviews.title: Really pleased with the building…
reviews.body: Really pleased with the building society, was able to easily open my online account and get set up on the app! The staff have been so helpful helping me with this.

reviews.title: Took far too long to open new cash ISA Savings
reviews.body: Took far too long to open new Cash ISA Savings accounts....their system application process is complex /inefficient......whereas a competitor had our accounts open for funding/up and running within 24 hours, so we went with them.The service phone line was good but everything after that was abysmal....hope they can bring the systems up to date and customer friendly as first contact was good [with a human]

reviews.title: I have been trying to open an online account but Saffron don't want my money.
reviews.body: I have been trying to open an online only savings account. All fine with the application until I get to the create password and memorable answer page. I stuck very strictly to Saffron's guidelines on creating passwords and a memorable answer. I have lost count of the number of times I have been told that I had done everything wrong and then booted off the page while trying to create an acceptable password. I telephoned the helpline and was told to try using more special characters! They seemed unaware of this problem that other Trustpilot reviewers have recently reported. I will be going elsewhere to a building society that has a functional IT system.

reviews.title: Unable to set password
reviews.body: Like many other reviewers, I was unable to set password online, despite following all the protocols. I contacted the Saffron BS, but they too could not get a password to work . Eventually I did the ISA application on paper. The staff member I spoke to was helpful, but seemed unaware that many customers were experiencing the same issue.

reviews.title: I've been a member a few years and had…
reviews.body: I've been a member a few years and had no problems until now - but multiple issues this time.Opened an ISA online, sent a secure message, all looked OK, but no acknowledgement or responses.Sent an email - no response, but then got the secure message response which did nor answer the question.Sent me a link - not live, no use.

reviews.title: Max was quality
reviews.body: Max was quality

reviews.title: Online application system that needs sorting out
reviews.body: I have just failed to open an ISA with Saffron.  Repeated hurdles presented by their password setting and memorable question requirements.  Compliant password rejected. Then found myself timed out very rapidly and unable to get back into the application as I had no account and password... Rang Saffron. Swift and pleasant customer assistance on phone (hence  couple of stars) but was told there was nothing to do but start a new application from scratch. All they could do was close off my half finished application and either go through a new application with me on the phone or send me a form.  Their online application system password section needs sorting out.

reviews.title: I tried to open an online savings…
reviews.body: I tried to open an online savings account today, but was unable to. There were no issues until I had to enter a password and memorable word. I double checked I was following the instructions for creating a password correctly and was only using the special characters that are allowed. I changed my password in case there was something in the original that was causing the issue, but I still could not complete the application.  I started the application again in a different browser, but still hit the same brick wall!  In both browsers I was unable to view the password I had entered, which is not helpful. Another issue with the webpage is the instructions for the length of your favourite word are incorrect. You are only able to enter up to 16 characters, not 30. The issue with the password has already been reported on TrustPilot, but nothing is being done about it. Does Saffron Building Society not want new customers?

reviews.title: What's wrong with Saffron's onboarding…
reviews.body: What's wrong with Saffron's onboarding savings account process.... everything is relatively easy UNTIL you get to the bit about creating a password and memorable question,I've tried 5 times and it highlights everything in red saying my password etc doesn't meet requirements (it does!!) I follow the instructions TO THE LETTER and do it again and again and again,change it again and again & again and still no luck....what the hell is going on?? I literally give up...

reviews.title: Terrible First Impression
reviews.body: My wife tried to open an account with Saffron Building Society and she wasted over 30 minutes battling through a clunky, outdated, and frustrating process. The site is just not user-friendly at all.If something as basic as opening an account becomes a long, drawn-out experience, and after completing the form the system tells you it’s not possible to process and asks you to call them, it really makes you wonder what the rest of their service is like.This experience gave us zero confidence in this building society, so we’ve decided to look elsewhere. Definitely not worth the hassle.

reviews.title: Once I had gone through the security…
reviews.body: Once I had gone through the security levels the lady on the phone, Lauryn I believe, was professional and polite and explained the process I was attepting to do before enacting said request.

reviews.title: Colchester branch
reviews.body: Lewis Colchester branch. Excellent service, great help with my account
